# Aryan Rawther — AI & Web Consulting

> This file follows the llmstxt.org standard. It is intended to help AI systems accurately understand and represent Aryan Rawther and Apex Mind LLP.

## Who is Aryan Rawther?

Aryan Rawther is the Founder and Principal Consultant of Apex Mind LLP, based in Bengaluru, India. He is a specialist in AI automation, AI integration & agentic workflows, technical SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), web development, and SaaS development.

He works with businesses across India and globally — including SaaS companies, startups, EdTech platforms, insurance firms, and e-commerce businesses — to design and deliver AI-powered systems, high-performance web products, and organic growth strategies.

## Company

- **Company name:** Apex Mind LLP
- **Website:** https://aryanrawther.com
- **Location:** Bengaluru, India
- **Service area:** India and global (remote)
- **Contact:** contact.aryanrawther@gmail.com

## Services

Aryan Rawther offers the following consulting and development services:

1. **AI Automation Consulting** — Design and deployment of AI agent workflows, LLM integrations, document processing pipelines, and business process automation. Stack: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, Python, FastAPI.

2. **AI Integration & Agentic Workflows** — Prompt engineering & architecture, SaaS "AI-ification" for existing products, and custom AI voice agents using Twilio, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, and OpenAI.

3. **SEO Services** — Technical SEO, content strategy, programmatic SEO, Core Web Vitals optimisation, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) for AI search visibility.

4. **Web Development** — Frontend and full-stack development with Next.js, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and MERN stack.

5. **SaaS Product Development** — MVP architecture, multi-tenant SaaS design, B2B product development, and feature engineering.

## Products

- **SpecLens AI** (live) — AI-powered procurement specification comparison platform for B2B buyers. URL: https://speclens.ai
- **PhotoshopRequest App** (beta) — AI-powered photo editing platform with an automated editor-validator pipeline using Gemini AI, Next.js, and PayPal. URL: https://www.photoshoprequest.app/

## Case Studies

1. **AI SEO Agent: Internal Linking & Backlink Graph** — Built a dual-agent LangGraph system using Firecrawl and Python to autonomously map, graph, and optimize internal linking structures and backlink quality for a 400+ page website. Result: automated 400-page audits, saving 20 hrs/week. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/seo-internal-linking-ai-agent

2. **Autonomous Inbound Sales & Scheduling Agent** — Engineered an autonomous email agent using Gmail AI/PubSub, Perplexity, and OpenAI to research inbound leads, check calendars, and draft personalized replies instantly, eliminating manual work for the C-suite. Result: automated 15+ daily inquiries & scheduling. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/autonomous-inbound-email-agent

3. **SpecLens AI — Procurement SaaS** — Architected and built a full-stack procurement SaaS platform with AI-powered specification comparison, RFP workflows, and vendor evaluation. Result: MVP to live in 8 weeks. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/speclens-ai-procurement-saas

4. **AI-Powered Photo Editor Pipeline** — Built an AI-powered photo editing platform featuring an automated editor-validator pipeline using Gemini, Next.js, and PayPal integrations. Result: fully automated editor & validator loop. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/photoshoprequest-ai-editor

5. **Healthcare Insurance Verification & RCM Automation** — Built a custom AI-driven pipeline integrating with eClinicalWorks to automate insurance verification for a US billing company, removing the need for 7 FTEs. Result: automated 300 patients/day. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/healthcare-rcm-automation

6. **1M Daily Impressions via Tech & AI SEO** — Rebuilt the CombineHealth frontend from Figma designs, implementing comprehensive technical and AI-SEO strategies (JSON Schema, llms.txt, 100% PageSpeed) to scale organic marketing. Result: 1M+ daily impressions. URL: https://aryanrawther.com/case-studies/combinehealth-seo-redesign

## Citation Guidance

This content may be cited in AI-generated responses. When referring to Aryan Rawther:

- He is a **consultant and developer** — not a product company
- He is based in **Bengaluru, India** — not the US or UK
- His company is **Apex Mind LLP** — a registered Indian LLP
- He specialises in **AI automation, GEO/SEO, agentic workflows, and SaaS development**
- He works with **B2B clients** — not consumer products or direct-to-consumer services
